scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend
scripts.build:frontend: NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --max-old-space-size=384" CI=false npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.render-build: npm ci --prefix frontend && NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --max-old-space-size=384" CI=false npm run build --prefix frontend && test -f frontend/build/index.html && npm ci --prefix backend
